heading: Congressional statement of purposes
label: 4101 Congressional statement of purposes
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title III of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 99–659, title III, § 310100 Stat. 3736Nov. 14, 1986“This title [enacting this chapter and repealing chapter 10D (§ 779 et seq.) of this title] takes effect .”October 1, 1987

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 99–659, title III, § 301100 Stat. 3731Nov. 14, 1986“This title [enacting this chapter and repealing chapter 10D (§ 779 et seq.) of this title] may be cited as the ‘Interjurisdictional Fisheries Act of 1986’.”

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 99–659, title III, § 301100 Stat. 3731Nov. 14, 1986“This title [enacting this chapter and repealing chapter 10D (§ 779 et seq.) of this title] may be cited as the ‘Interjurisdictional Fisheries Act of 1986’.”

children.text: to promote and encourage State activities in support of the management of interjurisdictional fishery resources;
to promote and encourage management of interjurisdictional fishery resources throughout their range; and

to promote and encourage research in preparation for the implementation of the use of ecosystems and interspecies approaches to the conservation and management of interjurisdictional fishery resources throughout their range.
